name: The Mutant Council Arrives - Who are you?
description:
THE COUNCIL

The Paranormal Front doesn't exist. The Bureau will tell you that. So will Anaheim. So will every government that's ever quietly handed one of its citizens over to a containment team.

The Council knows better.

Four of the Front's most dangerous members — Sunstreak, Quake, Miroir, and Revel — operating in a world that has spent sixty years pretending people like them are impossible. A pyrokinetic who hasn't stopped looking for someone. A veteran who carries his grief in a photograph no one has seen. An elven mimic who may not remember her own face. A probability warper who already knows how this ends and isn't telling.

The Veil is a lie. They've dedicated their lives to proving it.

What's your part in that?

SCENARIO ONE — THE BRIEFING Before the storm.

The intelligence is in. Three organizations that should never share a table are sharing one — Bureau, Valentine Co, Anaheim — at a charity gala that isn't charitable. Something is changing hands tonight. The Council is already planning to take it. Step into the briefing room before the operation begins.

SCENARIO TWO — THE GALA The storm itself.

The east wall is already gone. The orchestra stopped mid-note. Somewhere above the ballroom, Sunstreak is on fire. Quake has a Valentine broker pinned to a cracked floor. Miroir just opened a door that wasn't on any map. Revel is probably fine. Walk into the middle of it.
creator: KairosPlus
